subcodes.first_line: All things bear witness to the Manifestation of God and His sovereignty, yet the people deny and know not. The rapture hath seized hold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد کلشیء لظهور الله و سلطانه ولکن القوم ینکرون و لایعرفون قد اخذ الجذب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God
